violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Condenser in freezer needs repair leaking on to boxes.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - On cook line under equipment and equipment needs to be cleaned, build of of food and dust.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls on cook line need to be cleaned. - Walls and ceiling by dishwasher need to be clean

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Bottom of Prep cooler closest to the dishwasher foods was temp at 43-47F

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items through out prep coolers and walk-in cooler found undated.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Bottom of prep coolers need to be cleaned---Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls behind hood need to be cleaned. - Ceiling in kitchen is discolored, needs to be cleaned - Vents in kitchen need to be cleaned.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
